division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: A motorized bicycle, as defined in Section 406, is required to display a special license plate issued by the department.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 8.1. Motorized Bicycles [5030 - 5039]
##### § 5030

A motorized bicycle, as defined in Section 406, is required to display a special license plate issued by the department.

*(Added by Stats. 1980, Ch. 1070, Sec. 1.)*

subsections.text: A motorized bicycle, as defined in Section 406, is required to display a special license plate issued by the department.
